user_scenarios.user_goal: Verify that an autonomous stopped-budget run is continued and executed without competing owners, while the Dashboard reports honest reachability, version freshness, data freshness, and current decisions.
prerequisites: Fixture repository has a stopped_budget autonomous run with parent-17 complete and one completion carried since the last audit.
Supervisor, Worker, and Loop Dashboard can run against isolated fixture artifacts.
steps: Run Supervisor and verify it creates exactly one confirmed continuation but does not execute an existing run.
Run two Workers and verify the atomic action lease permits only one bounded execution.
Complete semantic parent-18 and verify the carried two-parent Reviewer cadence triggers.
Commit a wiki-only update and verify service reachability remains online while code fingerprints remain fresh.
Verify push-result and freshness-target artifacts are produced from the autonomous commit.
Open the Dashboard and inspect Supervisor metrics, decisions, freshness, and run history.
expected_outcomes: The continuation is created once with semantic_parent_task_next=18 and completed_since_last_audit=1.
Only one Worker leases and executes the existing run action; contention cannot duplicate work.
在线服务 uses reachability/tmux evidence and version freshness is displayed separately.
The current decision says 暂无待处理决策 when open_count is zero; stale worktree history remains historical.
push-result.json and a target-specific freshness record bind the run, task, commit, changed wiki paths, and trusted live evidence.
Four semantic parent tasks proceed without manual phase advancement, with Reviewer scheduled after every two completed parent tasks.
failure_signals: Supervisor directly invokes Planner, Generator, or Evaluator instead of queueing a bounded Worker action.
Two executors enter the same run concurrently.
A wiki-only commit makes all services appear offline or stale.
A historical worktree decision appears as the current required decision.
A successful autonomous main commit lacks push or freshness evidence.
The loop requires a manual continue between parent tasks.
cleanup: Stop isolated fixture services and remove temporary loop artifacts.
